Soniox Node SDK

Package: @soniox/node
Install: npm install @soniox/node

Create client:
  import { SonioxNodeClient } from '@soniox/node';
  const client = new SonioxNodeClient({ apiKey: '...' });
  // or set SONIOX_API_KEY

Transcribe (recommended wrappers to avoid one-of errors):
  const t = await client.stt.transcribeFromUrl(
    'https://example.com/audio.mp3',
    { model: 'stt-async-v4', wait: true }
  );
  const transcript = await t.getTranscript();
  console.log(transcript?.text);

Transcribe from file (Buffer/Uint8Array/Blob/ReadableStream):
  const t = await client.stt.transcribeFromFile(file, {
    model: 'stt-async-v4',
    filename: 'audio.mp3',
    wait: true,
  });

Transcribe from uploaded file id:
  const t = await client.stt.transcribeFromFileId(fileId, {
    model: 'stt-async-v4',
    wait: true,
  });

Core APIs:
  client.files.upload(file, options?)
  client.files.list(options?)
  client.files.get(id)
  client.files.delete(id)

  client.stt.create(options)
  client.stt.list(options?)
  client.stt.get(id)
  client.stt.getTranscript(id)
  client.stt.wait(id, options?)
  client.stt.delete(id)
  client.stt.destroy(id)

  client.models.list()
  client.auth.createTemporaryKey({ usage_type: 'transcribe_websocket', expires_in_seconds })
  client.realtime.createSession()

Webhooks:
  client.webhooks.handleExpress(req, auth?)
  client.webhooks.handleRequest(request, auth?)
  client.webhooks.handleFastify/handleNestJS/handleHono(...)
  // ok result includes fetchTranscript() for completed events

Environment variables:
  SONIOX_API_KEY
  SONIOX_API_BASE_URL
  SONIOX_API_WEBHOOK_HEADER
  SONIOX_API_WEBHOOK_SECRET
